title: senecio fistulosus var. fistulosus
intro: Senecio fistulosus var. fistulosus, also known as the hollow-stemmed ragwort, is a plant species native to Africa, characterized by its yellow flowers and hollow stems. The plant contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, such as reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues. The health benefits of Senecio fistulosus var. fistulosus include its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and coughs, and its potential anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
